deploy_attempts.error: dhi.io/python:3.12-debian13-sfw-dev HTTP 500 — runtime.txt python-3.11.x (ignored, no buildpack)
dhi.io/python:3.12-debian13-sfw-dev HTTP 500 — custom Dockerfile added (platform ignores it, uses generated Dockerfile with buildID=2deaee96)
HTTP 409 conflict (stale lock state from prior failures)
dhi.io/python:3.12-debian13-sfw-dev HTTP 500 — runtime.version: 3.11 in asset.yaml (ignored, platform still uses 3.12 generated Dockerfile)
dhi.io/python:3.12-debian13 HTTP 500 — probe attempt to check if cache recovered; buildID=2deaee96 still constant; outage confirmed ongoing as of 2026-06-26T08:03Z

root_cause: Platform infrastructure outage: dhi-cache.deployer.svc.cluster.local:5000 returns HTTP 500 for all dhi.io/python:3.12-debian13* manifests. The platform-generated Dockerfile always uses this image and cannot be overridden via runtime.txt, asset.yaml runtime block, or a custom Dockerfile (buildID=2deaee96 is constant across all attempts, confirming the platform ignores user-supplied Dockerfiles).
workarounds_tried: runtime.txt python-3.11.x — no effect (only for buildpack stacks, project uses custom Dockerfile flow)
Custom Dockerfile FROM python:3.11-slim — ignored by platform (generates its own Dockerfile)
asset.yaml runtime.version: 3.11 — ignored by platform (still generates FROM dhi.io/python:3.12)
resolution: Requires SAP Build platform team to fix dhi-cache.deployer.svc.cluster.local:5000 for python:3.12-debian13 image, OR allow users to override the base image via asset.yaml. No user-side workaround is possible with current platform behaviour. Outage confirmed still active as of 2026-06-26T08:03Z (attempt 8).

cf_push_incidents.fix: requirements.txt: langchain==1.3.9 → langchain==1.2.10, langgraph==1.2.5 → langgraph==1.0.10 (sap-ai-sdk-gen==6.6.0 requires langchain~=1.2.10)

cf_push_incidents.issue: aicore.py clientSecret casing bug — BTP Destination returns camelCase keys; code used lowercase cfg.get('clientsecret')
cf_push_incidents.fix: Added _cfg() case-insensitive helper inside init_llm_from_destination(); all credential lookups go through _cfg()

cf_push_incidents.issue: content filter corruption — _patch.py had cfg.get('clientSecret') redacted to literal [REDACTED]; caused NameError at runtime
cf_push_incidents.fix: Replaced [REDACTED] literal with _cfg('clientSecret') via python3 -c string replacement

cf_push_incidents.issue: langgraph ExecutionInfo ImportError — langgraph==1.0.10 lacks ExecutionInfo in langgraph.runtime; needed by langgraph-prebuilt
cf_push_incidents.fix: requirements.txt: sap-ai-sdk-gen==6.6.0 → 6.10.0 (resolves langchain~=1.2.14 → langgraph>=1.1.10 which has ExecutionInfo); all 167 tests pass

agent_status.cf_migration: complete — app/s4hana_client.py, app/aicore.py, app/tools/cf_tools.py, dual-mode agent.py/agent_executor.py/main.py
